texto: When I hear somebody talk about a horse or cow being stupid
autor: I figure it's a sure sign that the animal has somehow outfoxed them
explicacao: Citação de I figure it's a sure sign that the animal has somehow outfoxed them sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When I hear somebody talk about a horse or cow being stupid” articula reflexao, tom-dorrance, somebody em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
